name: Central Phitsanulok retail and Highway 12 fringe
notes: Retail-led urban fringe around Central Phitsanulok, adjacent malls, and the Singhawat / Highway 12 frontage where modern destination charging should carry more weight than pure old-town demand.

name: Old city medical and civic band
notes: Built-up inner-city band connecting Wat Yai, Buddhachinaraj Hospital, railway station, riverfront hotels, and civic trips.

name: Samo Khae bypass and terminal connector
notes: Connector demand around the bypass, terminal 2, logistics plots, and large-format retail expansion east of the main city.

name: Naresuan University south urban fringe
notes: University-medical-student demand cluster south of the city core, suitable for destination-style charging with long dwell time.

name: Wang Thong Route 12 connector
notes: Route 12 connector area capturing city-to-corridor trips toward Phetchabun and the eastern districts.
